## Plugin submission

- **Name:**
- **Repo:** <!-- owner/name, matches the entry in community.json -->
- **Category:** <!-- editor | views | connector | productivity | finance | social | ai | other -->

### Checklist

- [ ] My plugin's code lives in the repo above (not in this monorepo).
- [ ] The repo has a GitHub **Release** whose assets include `manifest.json`.
- [ ] The manifest `id` is reverse-domain (e.g. `com.you.cool-plugin`).
- [ ] I added exactly one `{ "repo", "category" }` entry to `registry/community.json`.
- [ ] I declared the capabilities my plugin needs (so users see them on install).
- [ ] The plugin is open-source under an OSI or FSL-1.1 license.

### Anything else
